What do the Goggleboxers think of Race Across the World, The Last of Us, MAFS Aus, WrestleMania, Chess Masters: The Endgame, Love on the Spectrum, and Secrets of the Penguins?
(2020) Body-swap comedy-horror with Vince Vaughn. A girl gets murdered by a serial killer but then wakes up in his body, with only 24 hours to get her own body back!
...Experiment: Curious couples sex-periment with opening up their relationships. Connor and Kirstie explore having a threesome. Chanice and Richardo face an unexpected issue.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Alan Johnson and his sidekick Dave Owen host at Dunsandles Guest House in New Brighton on Merseyside. Things get off to a hairy start with some scandalous sheets.
Nick and Gina Mead welcome their rivals to the Lady Teal Hotel Boat on the waterways near Burnley, where the afternoon entertainment is a freezing competition out on the locks.
Brock hopes that his sense of humour and perfectionist nature will impress his guests at York House in Tetbury, Gloucestershire. But his reluctance to go off-menu at breakfast disappoints.
Hospitality veterans Leo and Sonya Brooke-Little host at Heyford House in Oxfordshire. One guest settles some scores during an afternoon of boxing.
The B&Bers meet for one last time to settle some scores and find out how much they've been paid. After accusations of over-enthusiastic hosting, the winner is announced.
This week's competition kicks off in Falkirk, with mum and daughter Melissa and Fiona hosting at their cosy pub. Will a fridge-less room be their downfall?
At Cliff and Monika's place in the countryside near Loch Lomond, one B&Ber learns that maybe too much nature can be a bad thing in their jungle-themed room.
Brothers John and Andrew host the week's third visit, at the glampsite on their family farm in Dumfries and Galloway, where things get heated with saunas and hot tubs.
Sue hosts the week's final visit, at her Victorian townhouse B&B in Penrith, where a marmalade tasting is followed by some bittersweet discussion of payment day.
On payment day, a number of B&Bers are certain that their competitors have been doing some tit-for-tat marking. When the dust settles, who'll win the week?

programmes.show_name: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programmes.show_description: Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole visit Witney in Oxfordshire, where Henry discovers a tractor that hasn't run for years - but it's no problem for restorer Alan, the mechanical medic.
Phil catches up with Chloe, who wanted to fly the nest to be near buzzy Caversham, and Ella and Grant, who needed something spectacular to tempt Grant out of his mum's house.
A lifeboat is converted into a camping pod. A mum and three daughters create a charming straw bale house. And George enjoys an oriental delight on the Isle of Wight.
Scarlette Douglas helps Don and Margaret search for a bolthole on Portugal's western Algarve to escape the British winters. Can they find their dream holiday home within their £300k budget?
Lee Juggurnauth helps Robert and Thomas look for a holiday home near La Mata in south east Spain - a stepping stone to making a permanent move there. Can they find their dream pad for £82k?
...Ceremony - Signed and AD: Ade Adepitan, Billy Monger, Ed Jackson, Dame Sarah Storey, Sean Rose and Alice Tai present live coverage of the spectacular closing ceremony.
(2021) Tom McCarthy's crime thriller starring Matt Damon as an all-American, still-waters-run-deep oil worker from Oklahoma who travels to Marseilles to try to get his daughter out of jail.
(2021) Romantic drama with Odessa Young and Olivia Colman. In 1920s England a writer working as a maid has a passionate affair with the rich boy next door. It's not considered a good match.

Kirstie and Phil help two sets of house-hunters who've relocated to Aberdeen for work and need to find new family homes fast.
Keith and Marj turn the old schoolroom into a snug, complete with a baroque chair and feature wall, before discovering Capel Salem's fiery past at the National Library of Wales.
On night one in Manchester, Pauline plans a snug soiree with plenty of home comforts and a family feel... but she forgets to serve one of her guests! (Ep1/5)

programmes.show_name: A New Life in the Sun
programmes.show_description: Jen and Nick set up a horse charity, Brian and Paula give French life a second shot, and coffee bar owner James brings his business idea to Spain.

programmes.show_name: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programmes.show_description: Emma and her daughter Gracie are on a double house-hunt, for a new family home in the West Sussex countryside as well as a bolthole in Languedoc-Roussillon in the south of France.

programmes.show_name: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programmes.show_description: Bob and Judith, who have been married for over 40 years, can't agree on where their dream home should be: the rugged coastline of north Norfolk or the sunny beaches of the Costa Blanca.
Colchester. The first host, salesman Richard Massey, is banking on his signature dish of 'drunken duck' and his cheeky-chappy humour to bag him the prize. (Ep1/5)
Colchester. Smooth-talking PR man Darius rustles up a menu of local produce, including his own blackberry wine. But will his 'Roman Colchester' dress code be a hit? (Ep2/5)
Colchester. American army wife Adrena offers her guests an Armenian menu to reflect her heritage, and plans an Armenian egg fight for her guests' entertainment. (Ep3/5)
Colchester. IT consultant James Coe's sophisticated food is a hit from the get-go. But his constant chat about money is hard to stomach. (Ep4/5)
Colchester. It's the final day of the competition and vegetarian Jodie is out to wow her guests by giving them what they want: meat! If she can work up the courage to touch it... (Ep5/5)
Jean Johansson helps Andrea and Gary find their dream holiday home on the Caribbean island of St Lucia. What gems do they find for £205k and are any of them the one?
Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer go house-hunting in Derby and Nottingham for single mum Jo and adrenaline junkies Liz and John, who want a home big enough for all their sporting equipment.
George meets people taking on builds motivated by strong emotional ties. Chris, who has stage four cancer, and Ellie return to Chris's Ribble Valley roots to build a dream home.

programmes.show_name: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or...
programmes.show_description: ...List It: In Alnwick, Kirstie and Phil meet ministers Chris and Caroline, who need a divine intervention. Caroline loves their home and neighbours, but Chris craves more space.

A dangerous driver tries to flee the scene of a crash. An altercation between housemates needs some police attention. And Pete's copper's nose uncovers something unexpected.
PC Jodie and PC Zoe are called to break up a brawl between neighbours. And veteran officer Emma struggles to identify a child who's found wandering the streets late at night.
